# Indirect record-containment cycles previously passed resolution and
# overflowed the stack in zero-value emission (#506). Positions pinned
# (#520): the two field spans that form the cycle.
bynk.resolve.recursive_record_field record `A` contains itself through this field — `B` leads back to `A` @ 2:14
bynk.resolve.recursive_record_field record `B` contains itself through this field — `A` leads back to `B` @ 3:14
